session.user:
You need to update test files to match renamed Click CLI flags/params. The source code has already been updated with these renames:
| Old CLI Flag | New CLI Flag | Old Param | New Param | |--|--|--|--| | `--plan-number` (option) | `--pr-number` | `plan_number` | `pr_number` | | `--plan-id` (option, int type) | `--pr-number` | `plan_id` | `pr_number` | | `--plan-id` (option, str type) | `--pr-id` | `plan_id` | `pr_id` | | positional `plan_number` | positional `pr_number` | `plan_number` | `pr_number` | | positional `plan_id` (int) | positional `pr_number` | `plan_id` | `pr_number` | | positional `plan_id` (str) | positional `pr_id` | `plan_id` | `pr_id` | | `--plan`/`-p` (in admin.py) | `--pr`/`-p` | `plan` | `pr` |
**SPECIAL CASES for register_one_shot_plan.py and post_workflow_started_comment.py:** - `--plan-number` → `--pr-number` (the plan identifier) - The OLD `--pr-number` (impl PR number) → `--impl-pr-number` / `impl_pr_number`
**SPECIAL CASE for handle_no_changes.py:** - The `--plan-id` option was REMOVED entirely (its functionality merged into existing `--pr-number`) - Tests should no longer pass `--plan-id`
**SPECIAL CASE for dispatch_cmd.py:** - `DispatchResult.plan_number` → `DispatchResult.pr_number` - `DispatchResult.pr_number` (impl) → `DispatchResult.impl_pr_number` - `DispatchResult.pr_url` (impl) → `DispatchResult.impl_pr_url` - Positional `plan_numbers` → `pr_numbers`
**IMPORTANT RULES:** - Only rename CLI flags in test invocations (e.g., `["--plan-id", "123"]` → `["--pr-number", "123"]`) - Only rename function parameter references (e.g., `plan_number=123` → `pr_number=123`) - Only rename dataclass field references (e.g., `result.plan_number` → `result.pr_number`) - Do NOT rename help strings, error message text, or comments - Do NOT rename plan_backend, plan_store, plan_content, plan_title, plan_url, plan_body, plan_type, plan_file, plan_path variables — those are NOT part of this rename - Do NOT rename `plan_number` in `land_execute` — that command was NOT renamed
Update these test files:
1. `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_ci_update_pr_body.py` - `--plan-id` → `--pr-number` 2. `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_update.py` - `--plan-number` → `--pr-number` 3. `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_store_tripwire_candidates.py` - `--plan-number` → `--pr-number` 4. `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_register_one_shot_plan.py` - `--plan-number` → `--pr-number`, old `--pr-number` → `--impl-pr-number` 5. `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_post_workflow_started_comment.py` - `--plan-number` → `--pr-number`, old `--pr-number` → `--impl-pr-number` 6. `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_handle_no_changes.py` - remove `--plan-id` from CLI invocations, `plan_id` param → removed 7. `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_push_session.py` - `--plan-id` → `--pr-number` 8. `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_fetch_sessions.py` - `--plan-id` → `--pr-number`
For each file, read it first, then use the Edit tool to make all necessary changes. Be thorough — check every occurrence.
session.assistant: I'll update the test files to match the renamed Click CLI flags/params. Let me start by reading each file to understand the changes needed.

... [518 lines omitted] ...
86→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 140→ """Test error when no plan found.""" 168→ assert "No plan found" in output["error"] 172→ """Test error when issue does not exist.""" 195→ assert "999" in output["error"] 266→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 315→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 350→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 448→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 470→def test_plan_update_branch_push_failure_still_succeeds() -> None: 471→ """Test that push failure still reports success (PR body was updated).""" 475→ fake_git = FakeGit(push_to_remote_error=PushError(message="rejected")) 494→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 500→ # Commit was still made (before push failed) 534→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}"
